coverage_rows.verification_basis: named task exists and is the only primary user task
single page name is declared as Brief Intake
validation overlay is declared as the required system handoff
clickable elements are enumerated with stable element ids and mirrored in P2_INTERACTION_EDGE_TABLE.json
exactly five user-visible states are listed
recoverable failure state has retry and edit edges
inventory separates explicit elements, derived elements, rejected expansions, and human-review gaps

coverage_rows.requirement: shared component or presentation pattern decision
coverage_rows.verification_basis: validate and generate primary-action pattern decision is required downstream
desktop, tablet, mobile iOS, and mobile Material carrier constraints are enumerated
DRD-05 and DRD-06 artifact skeletons require final DRD manifest, hash index, reference index, and final review evidence

coverage_rule: A row is PASS only when the evidence path exists in this candidate and the requirement is expressed as a stable downstream artifact obligation.
